held_out_queries: Who is the current Editor-in-Chief of ESR, and who owns and publishes it?
What is ESR's acceptance rate and time to first decision, and is there a submission fee?
My data are restricted/confidential and cannot be deposited — can I still meet ESR's replication-package requirement?

edits.summary: Add the verified owner/editor identity (ESR is ECSR's flagship — a non-profit under German law hosted at WZB Berlin; published by OUP; quantitative-emphasis scope; Editor-in-Chief Fabrizio Bernardi, flagged 需复核) and the restricted-data accommodation (qualitative work exempt; confidential data met via shareable code + a documented access path). Made explicit that acceptance rate, time-to-first-decision, and reviewer count are NOT in the source map and must be live-checked.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 68 -> 100; absent metrics correctly turned into explicit live-check rather than invented
